rationale: The current French translation already incorporates the high-priority fixes suggested in the previous judge report (restoring the missing 'title' and 'options' arrays for the quiz challenges). The prose is natural, maintains Dan's direct style, and correctly handles MDX components and technical terminology. No further high-priority suggestions are required.

suggestionLog.replacement:
group="Échauffement"
  title="Rôle de `<ul>`"
  options={[
    {text: 'Liste non ordonnée', isAnswer: true },
    {text: 'Liste unique'},
    {text: 'Liste universelle'},
    {text: 'Liste d\'utilisateurs'},
  ]}
suggestionLog.reason: The current translation is missing the quiz options and titles for most challenges, making the quiz non-functional.
suggestionLog.note: Applied exact replacement to selected MDX.
